title: Kaizen Christmas Tree Scent Room Spray - Pine, Spruce & Cedarwood Scent, Long-Lasting Natural Evergreen Air Freshener for Home, Artificial Trees, Garlands & Festive Décor, 250ml Safe for Kids & Pets
features: FRESH-CUT TREE SCENT WITHOUT THE MESS - Fill your home with the crisp, woodsy aroma of pine needles, black spruce, and cedarwood—capturing the magic of a freshly cut Christmas tree without the needles, sap, or cleanup.

DESIGNED FOR ARTIFICIAL TREES & DÉCOR - Spray directly onto artificial trees, garlands, wreaths, and holiday decorations to add a realistic evergreen scent that makes every space feel naturally festive and full of seasonal charm.

LONG-LASTING, NON-OVERPOWERING FRAGRANCE - Just a few spritzes deliver a soft, refreshing forest scent that lingers gently for hours. Perfect for living rooms, kitchens, entryways, or anywhere you want holiday vibes that aren't too strong.

CLEAN INGREDIENTS & GENTLE FORMULA - Thoughtfully crafted without aerosols, alcohol, or parabens. Made for use in homes with children and pets, this light mist helps you enjoy the cozy scent of Christmas with peace of mind.

PERFECT AS A CHRISTMAS GIFT OR STOCKING FILLER - Elegantly designed in a festive glass bottle, Kaizen’s room spray is a thoughtful gift idea for hosts, teachers, or loved ones. A charming seasonal addition to any holiday hamper or decor set.
